title: CCTV Tester, IPC-5200C Plus 5 Inch IPS Touch Screen IP CVBS Analog Camera Tester 4K H.265 Video Monitor with HDMI Input/POE/WiFi/Cable Tracker/TVI CVI AHD/Firmware Upgraded
features: 【CCTV Monitor Support 8MP AHD TVI CVI Tester,HDMI/ VGA input ,SDI test, Cable Tracer 】 8MP TVI test, 3840 x 2160P 12.5/15 FPS, 4xzoom, video record & playback, coaxial PTZ control & call OSD menu./ 8MP AHD test, 3840 x 2160P 15 FPS, 4xzoom, video record & playback, coaxial PTZ & call OSD menu ./ 8MP CVI test, 3840 x 2160P 12.5/15FPS, 4xzoom, video record & playback, coaxial PTZ & call OSD menu. / DC12V/3A power output, camera can be powered from DC 12 Voltage.

【 5-In-1 Multifunction CCTV Moniotr Displays】This CCTV camera monitor have 5 inch IPS touch screen, 1920*1080 resolution. it is support H.265 & H .264 IP, 4K video display via mainstream. this monitor support Analog camera test, PTZ controller, support Auto HD app, auto recognize HD coax camera type and resolution, support snapshot, video record & playback, coaxial PTZ & call OSD menu, this cctv moniotor Built in Wi-Fi, display image from the wireless camera, create WIFI hotspot.

【CCTV Moniotr 】 Rapid , Auto log in and display image, create testing report. / IPC test pro, auto scan all network segments IP, auto open PoE power and display the power. Input username and password, can scan camera image, can batch activate use for HIK camera and Dahua cameras. Jump to interface and test tools./ IP and analog display image at the same time.

【Use for HIK Test Tool, Dahua Test Tool】 Use for HIK test tool, support batch activate Use for HIK cameras and modify IP address, modify password etc. Self-defined modify channel name, can quickly change H.264 and H.265 video, open wide dynamic mode. Factory restore, etc. / Dahua test tool, support batch activate DAHUA cameras and modify IP address, user name and password. Self-defined modify channel name. / Rapid video, just by one key to detect all network cameras and auto display.

【Cable Test of This CCTV Tester 】 Improvement cable tester, UTP cable, telephone cable etc order and connectivity test, can save testing report, if special number, need customized. Can detect the near-end, mid-end and far-end fault point of the RJ45 cable plug / RJ45 TDR cable test, test cable pair status, length, attenuation, reflectivity, impedance, skew etc, can create test report.This IPC CCTV AHD TVI CVI CVBS camera tester use for CCTV system installation and maintenance.
description: Product Description IPC5200C plus IPC1800 plus IV8W IPC1910 IPC9800MOVTADHS plus X9MOVTADHS Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.9 out of 5 stars 77 — 3.8 out of 5 stars 128 4.7 out of 5 stars 3 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 3.0 out of 5 stars 1 Price £319.00 £ 319 . 00 — no data £109.00 £ 109 . 00 £213.00 £ 213 . 00 — no data £759.00 £ 759 . 00 screen size 5 inch IPS touch screen, 1920x1080 resolution 4 inch IPS touch screen , 800*480 resolution 5inch 4 inch IPS touch screen , 960*640 resolution 7 inch IPS touch screen, 1920*1200 resolution 8 inch touch screen with retina display ,2048*1536 resolution IPC camera test ✓ ✓ no data ✓ ✓ ✓ 8MP AHD camera test ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ 8MP TVI camera test ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ 8MP CVI camera test ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ HD-SDI/3G-SDI/EX-SDI* ✓ no data no data no data ✓ ✓ DC power output DC12V 3A DC12V 3A DC12V 1A DC12V 3A DC12V 3A DC12V 3A POE power output 48V 48V no data 48V 48V 48V HDMI input ✓ no data ✓ no data ✓ ✓ HDMI output no data no data no data no data ✓ ✓ IPC5200C IPC CCTV tester monitor 12MP IPC Tester 8MP/AHD/CVI/TV/SDI CCTV Tester with HDMI VGA Input CCTV Monitor for IP Camera Tester CCTV Tester CCTV Application The 5 inch IPS touch screen IP camera tester is designed for maintenance and installation of IP analog, HD coaxial cameras as well as other security equipment. The 1920*1080 resolution enables it to display network HD cameras and analog cameras in high resolution. The unit supports many O** PTZ and analog PTZ control, and cable test functions. CCTV installers often need to carry a variety of testing tools to complete their work. If take the all in one camera tester, making working conditions safer and increasing productivity.
